message:
feat(extras): add Scanline CRT/retro text effect (bd-3r87)

Implement new TextEffect::Scanline variant for CRT monitor simulation:

- Dimming every Nth row to simulate scanlines (configurable line_gap)
- Adjustable intensity from subtle to pronounced (0.0-1.0)
- Optional scrolling scanlines for animated CRT feel
- Phosphor flicker simulation with time-based pseudo-random variation

Example usage:
  StyledText::new("RETRO")
    .effect(TextEffect::Scanline {
      intensity: 0.3,
      line_gap: 2,
      scroll: true,
      scroll_speed: 1.0,
      flicker: 0.05,
    })

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
